title: Gal`ed #1567
definition:
Galeed = "witness heap"

 1) the pile of stones heaped up between Jacob and Laban to certify
    their covenant; located on Mt Gilead
nasbUsage:
Definition: Galeed = "witness heap"

 1) the pile of stones heaped up between Jacob and Laban to certify
    their covenant; located on Mt Gilead

    NASB:  witness-pile, a memorial of stones E. of the Jordan River
